title: Nyelon's Vanilla Purple Edit
description: A (very early alpha) edit of vanilla textures that replaces certain textures with PUUUURPLE for pristine lovers of purple like me (mostly diamonds rn lmao)
body:
A purple vanilla edit pack aimed at those that just really love purple.
DEFINITELY not the best one you can find, however definitely a *sort of* unique pack.
As usual, put the zip (or the extracted folder) into your resourcepacks folder and run it. For some reason, it says it's made for an older version for me (at least when i launch fabric), but since I HAVE NOT altered any textures that were added in newer versions, it should be fine.
Thanks for downloading, and expect updates, unless I lose interest, which is when I'll archive the project and only keep updating it for newer versions.
